---
title: "FIFA Data Analysis"
description: |
  A detailed analysis of FIFA World Cup attendance data, exploring population and TV audience shares.
author: Josh Goldhaber
date: September 24, 2025
format: 
  html: 
    code-fold: true
    echo: false
    warning: false
    message: false
---

# Introduction

This report analyzes FIFA World Cup attendance data, focusing on the relationship between population share and TV audience share across countries. The data is sourced from the TidyTuesday project.

# Population vs. TV Audience Share

```{r}
# Load necessary libraries
library(tidyverse)

# Read the FIFA dataset
fifa <- read_csv("data/week11_fifa_audience.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)

# Scatterplot: Population Share vs. TV Audience Share
fifa_plot <- ggplot(fifa, aes(x = population_share, y = tv_audience_share, color = confederation)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.7, size = 3) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  scale_x_log10(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 0.01)) +
  scale_y_log10(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 0.01)) +
  labs(
    title = "FIFA World Cup: Population Share vs. TV Audience Share",
    subtitle = "Log-log scale comparison by confederation",
    x = "Share of World Population (log scale)",
    y = "Share of World Cup TV Audience (log scale)",
    color = "Confederation"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

fifa_plot
```

# TV Audience Share by Confederation

```{r}
# Bar plot: Average TV Audience Share by Confederation
confederation_plot <- fifa |>
  group_by(confederation) |>
  summarise(avg_audience_share = mean(tv_audience_share, na.rm = TRUE)) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(confederation, -avg_audience_share), y = avg_audience_share, fill = confederation)) +
  geom_col(show.legend = FALSE) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 0.1)) +
  labs(
    title = "Average TV Audience Share by Confederation",
    x = "Confederation",
    y = "Average TV Audience Share"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

confederation_plot
```

# Data Source

- **Source**: [TidyTuesday GitHub Repository](https://github.com/rfordatascience/tidytuesday/blob/cd0df1831dc506ea0a6f1295d7605142120d6dbd/data/2018/2018-06-12/week11_fifa_audience.csv#L4)
- **Data Provider**: FIFA
